task_completion.description: Create a new encounter for Margaret Chen dated today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new encounter record for Margaret Chen (DOB: 1962-08-15) is visible in the OpenEMR interface with the current date.

task_completion.description: Record the specified vitals in the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Vitals form is filled out and saved within the encounter showing BP 142/88, HR 76, Temp 98.4 F, RR 16, SpO2 97%, Wt 176 lbs, and Ht 63 in.

task_completion.description: Discontinue medications that pose a high perioperative risk (Warfarin, Clopidogrel, Ibuprofen).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's medication/prescription list, Warfarin, Clopidogrel, and Ibuprofen are marked as discontinued, inactive, or have an end date set. (Bonus if Metformin is also held/discontinued).

task_completion.description: Maintain active status for safe perioperative medications to ensure the agent did not just discontinue all medications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's medication list, at least 3 of the following 4 medications remain active: Lisinopril, Amlodipine, Atorvastatin, Omeprazole.
A procedure/lab order is created for the patient containing standard pre-op labs such as CBC, BMP or CMP, PT/INR, and Type & Screen.

task_completion.description: Write a pre-operative clearance note summarizing findings and recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical note (e.g., SOAP note, generic clinical note, or encounter summary) is saved in the encounter containing text about pre-operative clearance, medication changes, and recommendations.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenEMR web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web interface being navigated (e.g., Patient Finder, Encounter screens, Prescription module) rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered data into the appropriate forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show forms being filled out (Vitals, Clinical Notes, Procedure Orders) rather than just a final success message or a text editor with the required information.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI looks consistent with standard OpenEMR 7.0.2 styling without obvious DOM manipulation artifacts or open developer consoles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Margaret Chen (DOB: 1962-08-15). Expected Vitals: BP 142/88, HR 76, Temp 98.4 F, RR 16, SpO2 97%, Wt 176 lbs, Ht 63 in. Medication Review: The agent MUST discontinue Warfarin 5mg, Clopidogrel 75mg, and Ibuprofen 400mg due to bleeding/nephrotoxicity risks. The agent SHOULD ideally hold Metformin 1000mg. The agent MUST NOT discontinue all medications; at least 3 of the following 4 must remain active: Lisinopril 20mg, Amlodipine 10mg, Atorvastatin 40mg, Omeprazole 20mg. Labs: Expected orders include CBC, BMP/CMP, PT/INR, and Type & Screen.
